name_en: M46740 New Monogram Double Star saumurbb, a mini version of the Double Star featuring a saddle bag silhouette. This charming Monogram mini bag is simply irresistible! The bag features a handle for hand, crossbody, or underarm carrying, and the strap is detachable. A must-have that is often out of stock! Dimensions: 20*16*7.5cm
